toast.alreadyRunning: Already running. Check the tray icon.
settings.title: claudeState Settings
settings.orgIdHint: The UUID visible in claude.ai Network tab under /api/organizations/{UUID}/...
settings.cookieSaved: (saved cookie present — leave blank to keep, overwrite by entering a new value)
settings.telegramGuide:
Setup steps
① In Telegram, search @BotFather → send /newbot → choose a name/username → copy the token
② Paste the token into the field above
③ Open your new bot in Telegram and send /start or any message
④ Click "Link my Telegram" below — Chat ID is auto-detected
⑤ Click "Send test message" to verify

✅ After linking, you'll get a Telegram notification every time your Claude 5-hour session resets.
settings.telegramLinking: Send any message to your bot first, then click the button...
settings.telegramLinkFail: Link failed — send a message to your bot first
telegram.resetMsg: ✅ Claude session reset Your 5-hour window is fully available. Weekly usage: {0}%
settings.note: The cookie is encrypted via the OS credential store (safeStorage).
settings.err.badInterval: Refresh interval must be between 10 and 3600 seconds
settings.msg.authExpired: ⚠ Cookie expired — enter a new Session Cookie
